Functions to display modals for Pebble reset, Bluetooth issues, and worker crashes.

# Purpose
This header file declares three functions related to user interface notifications for a Pebble device. The function [`crashed_ui_show_pebble_reset`](<#crashed_ui_show_pebble_reset>) displays a modal indicating that the Pebble device has reset. The function [`crashed_ui_show_bluetooth_stuck`](<#crashed_ui_show_bluetooth_stuck>) shows a modal related to Bluetooth connectivity issues. The function [`crashed_ui_show_worker_crash`](<#crashed_ui_show_worker_crash>) takes an `AppInstallId` as a parameter and displays a modal for a worker crash event. These functions are part of the user interface management for handling specific error or crash scenarios on the device.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `process_management/app_install_types.h`
